name: forgejo-mcp
description: Connect Claude to Codeberg/Forgejo: issues, pull requests, files, branches, labels, milestones, workflows, time tracking, and more.
long_description:
Wraps the forgejo-mcp server (https://codeberg.org/goern/forgejo-mcp) as a Claude desktop Extension. Exposes the full Forgejo REST API surface to Claude via MCP — issues, pull requests, repositories, branches, files, comments, labels, milestones, workflows (Forgejo Actions), time tracking, and attachments. Compatible with Codeberg.org out of the box; configure the URL field for self-hosted Forgejo instances.

Server binary by goern (https://codeberg.org/goern/forgejo-mcp). Initial extension packaging contributed by Whetstone (https://codeberg.org/whetstone); the server binary itself is unchanged.

forgejo_url.title: Forgejo URL
forgejo_url.description: Base URL of your Forgejo instance (default: https://codeberg.org)

access_token.title: Access Token
access_token.description: Personal access token from your Forgejo instance (Settings → Applications → Access Tokens).
